◎简　　介  

　　from the User Comments of imdb:I'd say it has a touch of Ally McBeal, she's a secretary and a few times she day-dreams like Ally. It is the story of a woman in love with her boss, he barely knows that she is alive, until she leaves for another job, and then he has to iron his own shirts ... I liked it, it was light, and probably I'm a little biased, because I liked the pret...
